sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22437" key="glwssoga/stwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωσσο-γάστωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">living by one's tongue</tr_>, Com. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.108</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
